message:
Widen provider API visibility: make build_request methods and request structs pub

Four provider modules (Azure, Bedrock, GitLab, Vertex) had their
`build_request` methods and associated request struct types marked
private. This change promotes them to `pub` to enable cross-module
access patterns needed for integration testing, benchmarking harnesses,
and inter-provider composition without requiring friend-module hacks.

Specific changes:
- azure.rs: `fn build_request` → `pub fn build_request`,
  `struct AzureRequest` → `pub struct AzureRequest`
- bedrock.rs: `fn build_request` → `pub fn build_request`,
  `struct BedrockConverseRequest` → `pub struct BedrockConverseRequest`
- gitlab.rs: `fn build_request` → `pub fn build_request`,
  `struct GitLabChatRequest` → `pub struct GitLabChatRequest`
- vertex.rs: `fn build_gemini_request` → `pub fn build_gemini_request`

No behavioral changes; purely visibility modifiers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
